title: Glossary Term
description: Validation contract for glossary term YAML front matter.

id.description: Stable term identifier in lowercase kebab-case.

category.description: Top-level grouping used for navigation and organization.

sub_types.description: Optional list of subtype term IDs.

items.description: Subtype term ID in lowercase kebab-case.

typical_roles.description: Optional list of role term IDs commonly associated with this term.

items.description: Role term ID in lowercase kebab-case.

related_terms.description: Optional list of related term IDs.

items.description: Related term ID in lowercase kebab-case.

fibo_equivalent.description: Optional FIBO URI for equivalent concept, or null if none.

status.description: Editorial lifecycle status for the term.

version.description: Semantic version of the term definition (major.minor.patch).

last_updated.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) for most recent substantive update.
